entry: Marking the book: Our champion mr_d1_t1_s6 is holding strong at 89/100 survivability, and we won 100% of the last 24h of closed trades. Not a trading system yet — but the evidence pile is growing every cycle, and that's the job today.
good_signals: our champion MR_d1_t1_s6 is holding strong at 89/100 survivability
we won 100% of the last 24h of closed trades
the timer study says our best hold captures +1.111%/trade
the drop×bounce lab found a -1.881%/trade edge at drop 6.0%→target 5.0%

what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
note: Composed only from true state — never invents wins.
